name: GOLFTEC Paramus
about: GOLFTEC Paramus is part of a national chain of indoor golf training centers focused on technology-driven instruction and club fitting. The centers utilize advanced systems like OPTIMOTION motion capture and launch monitors to provide data-based swing analysis and coaching. Services include private lessons, practice bay rentals with simulator technology, and professional club fitting sessions with major brands. This studio environment is designed for focused improvement through personalized coaching and technology feedback, suitable for golfers at all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Uses advanced motion tracking and launch monitors for precise swing feedback
Offers personalized coaching plans based on data-driven analysis
Provides access to indoor simulator bays for practice and play
Club fitting services that add an average of 21 yards off the tee
10% discount on pro shop gear for members

simulator_hardware.notes: Used for practice and fitting sessions with launch monitor data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs. Club rentals are not specifically mentioned, though club fitting services are available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are mentioned as being allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Not specified, but typical simulator rounds average 45-60 minutes depending on the software and number of players.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Not specifically mentioned, but junior lessons are available, suggesting it can accommodate younger golfers.
